title: OTP Screen - Verify behavior on exceeding maximum OTP retry attempts
description: Tests the account locking mechanism after 3 failed OTP attempts.
preconditions: User is on the OTP screen.

steps.description: 1. Enter an incorrect OTP. Verify 'Invalid OTP' error. (Attempt 1)
2. Enter another incorrect OTP. Verify 'Invalid OTP' error. (Attempt 2)
3. Enter a third incorrect OTP. Verify 'Invalid OTP' error. (Attempt 3)
4. Observe the screen for a message about account locking.

expected_result: After the 3rd failed attempt, a message is displayed indicating the account is temporarily locked and to try again later. The OTP input fields may be disabled.
